prompt:
Ultra realistic lifestyle fashion collage of a beautiful young woman in a wide open green park during golden hour sunset, soft warm sunlight, cinematic natural lighting, aesthetic Korean fashion vibe, wearing a deep burgundy oversized button-up shirt, light blue wide-leg denim jeans, white sneakers, carrying a dark brown leather shoulder bag. Multi-frame collage layout with 5 candid moments.

Frame 1: full body walking naturally beside a small narrow water canal, holding phone in hand, wind flowing through long wavy hair, relaxed expression.
Frame 2: sitting cross-legged on fresh grass near the canal, touching hair softly, calm and dreamy mood.
Frame 3: back pose standing beside canal looking toward sunset sky, long hair flowing, peaceful atmosphere.
Frame 4: close mirror selfie style shot hiding face with phone, soft sunlight on hair and shirt.
Frame 5: seated playful candid pose covering face with hands while smiling softly.

Huge green grassy field everywhere, minimal trees, open sky with soft clouds, distant people blurred in background, realistic park environment, natural shadows, shallow depth of field, editorial photography style, Pinterest aesthetic, clean collage borders, high detail skin texture, authentic candid moments, DSLR quality, soft cinematic color grading, ultra photorealistic, cozy feminine vibe, 4k.
